title: Mushy Norwegian Tofu Bowl
description: A sour and gooey vegetarian bowl with tofu, tomato ketchup and wok-hei flavor, perfect for a cozy date night.
instructions: Press the tofu for 15 minutes, then cut into 0.5-inch cubes.
Whisk together tomato ketchup, soy sauce, sesame oil, grated ginger, and minced garlic until smooth.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat and add tofu cubes, stirring until golden brown.
Add broccoli florets and sliced mushrooms to the wok and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
Pour the sauce mixture over the tofu and vegetables, cooking until the sauce thickens and coats everything, about 5 minutes.
Stir in cooked quinoa and toss to combine, letting the bowl heat through for 2 minutes.
Sprinkle chopped scallions and toasted sesame seeds over the bowl before serving.
Serve hot, optionally drizzle with extra soy sauce if desired.
